author: Geno Zhou
description: Simple spaced repetition for flashcards: Cloze, Q&A, zero-config. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.name: Release 1.2.18

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- 🎨 toggle click-to-reveal cloze review command

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GenoZhou/easy-recall/compare/1.2.16...1.2.17
releases.name: Release 1.2.17

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- 🧩 Add optional click-to-reveal Cloze review mode with per-item hidden, shown, and crossed-out states.
- 🎚️ Add configurable Hard and Good thresholds so the final rating is calculated from the shown-item ratio.
- ⌨️ Keep click-to-reveal mode focused on self-testing by disabling answer/rating shortcuts while preserving hint reveal when available.
- 🧪 Add parser, settings, and review-session tests for click-to-reveal behavior and threshold normalization.
- 🔎 Harden release verification with wait/retry handling for GitHub Release and workflow creation races.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GenoZhou/easy-recall/compare/1.2.14...1.2.15
releases.name: Release 1.2.15

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Changes

- 🧭 Use Obsidian public vault file enumeration for deck scans instead of relying on internal metadata cache fields.
- 🛟 Include uncached Markdown files as a safe fallback so global review does not silently miss cards while MetadataCache is incomplete.
- ✅ Add coverage for missing cache, unavailable cache APIs, and filtered scan behavior.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GenoZhou/easy-recall/compare/1.2.13...1.2.14
releases.name: Release 1.2.14

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 🚀 Avoided broad vault file enumeration when discovering decks.
- 🧠 Leaned more on Obsidian metadata cache for file filtering.
- 🧪 Added deck-filter coverage for the metadata-backed scan path.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GenoZhou/easy-recall/compare/1.2.12...1.2.13
releases.name: Release 1.2.13

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 🌐 Switched language detection to Obsidian's language API.
- 📦 Added release asset attestations to the GitHub release workflow.
- 🧹 Fixed CSS lint warnings and trimmed a bundled dependency edge.
- 🛠️ Corrected release verification repository handling.
- 📚 Clarified Community Plugin Marketplace installation status.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GenoZhou/easy-recall/compare/1.2.11...1.2.12
releases.name: Release 1.2.12

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 🏷️ Added configurable deck tag prefixes.
- 🧭 Centralized tag-prefix handling across commands, deck discovery, settings, and review UI.
- 🎨 Refined styles for the updated settings and review surfaces.
- 🧪 Expanded parser, deck-filter, settings, and review-session coverage.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GenoZhou/easy-recall/compare/1.2.10...1.2.11
releases.name: Release 1.2.11

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- ✅ Added a dedicated release verification script for tag, release, and workflow checks.
- 🚦 Strengthened prerelease and stable release scripts with built-in verification hooks.
- 📝 Tightened release workflow guidance for future maintainers.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GenoZhou/easy-recall/compare/1.2.9...1.2.10
releases.name: Release 1.2.10

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GenoZhou/easy-recall/compare/1.2.8...1.2.9
releases.name: Release 1.2.9

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 🙈 Added heading hide markers for review paths.
- 🧩 Preserved child heading context while masking hidden path segments as `[...]`.
- ⚙️ Lowered the default review batch size to 20.
- 🧪 Added parser and review-session tests for hidden headings and batch behavior.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GenoZhou/easy-recall/compare/1.2.7...1.2.8
releases.name: Release 1.2.8

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

- 🧮 Improved current-note review command wiring.
- 🎨 Polished settings and review UI styling.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GenoZhou/easy-recall/compare/1.2.6...1.2.7
releases.name: Release 1.2.7

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- 🧰 Continued hardening release preparation for the 1.2.x line.
- 🧪 Extended review-session and settings coverage around batch and stats behavior.
- 🎛️ Improved settings defaults and localized settings copy.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/GenoZhou/easy-recall/compare/1.2.5...1.2.6
releases.name: Release 1.2.6

releases.author: GenoZhou
releases.description:
## Changelog
- Added a "New card" status tag in the review UI for cards that have never been rated Hard or Good.
- Cleaned up the review statistics implementation by removing the old upcoming-window list code after replacing it with the due-date chart.
- Updated prerelease publishing so future GitHub prereleases use generated release notes instead of file-change lists.

## Validation
- npm run prepublish
